purpose: Benchmark and corpus metadata for future Slopless fixture expansion. Large corpora were not downloaded.

corpora.name: RAID
corpora.shape: Over 10 million documents; 11 generators; 11 domains; 4 decoding strategies; 12 adversarial attacks.
corpora.labels: Train and extra splits include labels; test is leaderboard-oriented.
corpora.slopless_use: Use no-download metadata now; future samples can stress detector robustness against adversarial whitespace, homoglyph, zero-width, paraphrase, synonym, spelling, and casing attacks.
corpora.download_status: Not downloaded due size. README captured.

corpora.name: MAGE
corpora.shape: 447,674 human and machine texts; 10 human source datasets; 27 LLMs; 8 testbeds.
corpora.schema: CSV columns: text, label, source information. Label 0 is machine-generated; label 1 is human-written.
corpora.slopless_use: Sample balanced human/machine pairs for flowing corpus tests, especially story generation and scientific writing.
corpora.download_status: Not downloaded due benchmark size. README captured.

corpora.name: HC3
corpora.shape: Human answers and ChatGPT answers to the same questions; English and Chinese.
corpora.slopless_use: Use question-aligned human and ChatGPT answers to build no-hit/hit corpus pairs. Existing indicating-word files are useful for leakage fixtures.
corpora.download_status: Full dataset not downloaded. README and English indicating-word files captured.

corpora.name: HC3 Plus
corpora.shape: Extends HC3 with semantic-invariant tasks: summarization, translation, paraphrasing, plus QA.
corpora.slopless_use: Best source for testing style-only detection against semantic-invariant rewrites.
corpora.download_status: Full JSONL files not downloaded. README and file sizes captured.

corpora.name: M4GT-Bench
corpora.shape: Multilingual, multidomain, multi-generator benchmark for binary, generator-attribution, and mixed human-machine boundary detection.
corpora.slopless_use: Future source for mixed-authorship fixtures and boundary detection examples.
corpora.download_status: Dataset Google Drive recorded, not downloaded. README captured.

corpora.name: Beemo
corpora.shape: 6.5k human, machine, and expert-edited texts; 13.1k additional machine-generated texts edited by LLMs.
corpora.slopless_use: Good corpus for distinguishing raw model output from expert-edited or LLM-edited output.
corpora.download_status: Full parquet not downloaded. README and Hugging Face card captured.
